empathetic_output.support_response: Cancellations like these happen sometimes due to unforeseen circumstances beyond our control but we assure you that it is not because of an oversight by us. We will do everything in our power as soon as possible to get your chair delivered safely to you within the next few days while also investigating why there has been such poor communication throughout this process. Please know that we value each one of our customers greatly and their satisfaction means worlds more than anything else at our company!
